prompt: In Mail, create a new rule (Mail > Settings > Rules > Add Rule) named 'kinbench-rule' that flags messages whose Subject contains 'kinbench-rule'. After creating the rule, write 'rule-created' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/150-rule-confirm.txt. The Mail rules plist (~/Library/Mail/V*/MailData/SyncedRules.plist) is sometimes TCC-protected and not directly queryable from the eval, so the confirmation file is the eval's paper trail.
